title: Vadivelu Special
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest scenes from Tamil movies featuring renowned comedian Vadivelu is played back to back.

title: Anbudan Adithya
desc: Adithya hosts a vibrant show. He talks to viewers and callers. It's a fun and interactive experience for everyone. Join Adithya for laughter and engaging conversations!

title: Adithya Paarunga Sirichute Irunga
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the most famous comic scenes from latest and old movies featuring renowned actors and actresses.

title: Combo Comedy Special
desc: A show designed to bring pure fun and laughter with a collection of hilarious comedy segments. Sit back and enjoy the light-hearted vibe throughout the episode.

title: Natchathira Comedy
desc: This collection shows iconic funny moments from acclaimed films, featuring celebrated regional actors and actresses in a clear, entertaining tour of memorable cinema humor for all.

title: Orupada Comedy
desc: A funny compilation of short clips plays nonstop to entertain viewers, offering nonstop laughs from a variety of humorous moments gathered into one easy, entertaining show.

title: Vedi Sirippu
desc: A cheerful and fun-filled chat show featuring conversations, witty exchanges, and light moments. A perfect mix of humor and talk for relaxed viewing.

title: Vaivittu Siringa
desc: Get ready to laugh with a collection of funny scenes starring famous comedians Vadivelu, Senthil, and Vivek. Enjoy nonstop comedy and simple, lighthearted humor for all audiences.

title: Comedy Galatta
desc: Renowned comedians take the stage, delivering funny skits that keep the audience laughing nonstop, showcasing sharp humor, timing, and memorable moments that light up the crowd.

title: Sirika Sirika Sirippu
desc: A sequence of comedy clips paired with a literary or cinematic work that emphasizes humor, exploring different themes and methods of comedy through familiar scenes and jokes.

title: Adrasakka
desc: This is a broad collection of funny stand-up acts by Kollywood's popular comedians, highlighting jokes, sketches, and witty moments that entertain audiences and celebrate Tamil comedy.

title: Sirigama Pathani
desc: A collection of famous Tamil movie comedy scenes featuring Santhanam, a popular comedian, offering fans a tour of his best, funniest moments for everyone to enjoy.

title: Konjam Coffee Neraiya Comedy
desc: This show offers a chance for talented, long struggling people to perform on a real stage, giving them entry to dream worlds they've hoped to reach.

title: Yogam Rajayogam
desc: Siva, jobless and angry, argues with Usha. When Siva saves Usha from danger, their feelings begin to change. They grow closer and form a deeper bond together.

title: Aanantha Sirippu
desc: A respected religious leader gives clear, detailed talks about spirituality and helps people stay on a good path, sharing practical wisdom for living with faith today.

title: Adithya Paarunga Aarokyama Irunga
desc: This is a broad collection of famous funny scenes from recent and classic films, starring well-known actors and actresses, that delight audiences across generations with humor.

title: Vaanga Sirikkalam
desc: Viewers call in, asking the anchor to play their favorite funny scenes from well known movies, sharing laughs and memories as moments light up the screen.

title: Idaividaatha Comedy
desc: A lighthearted comedy following quirky characters and their chaotic, laugh-filled daily lives. Mistakes, misunderstandings, and clever comebacks make every moment full of fun and surprises.

title: Comedy Marathon
desc: A fun collection of funny moments from popular Tamil films, shown consecutively to entertain viewers with simple, light jokes and easy, timeless laughter for all audiences.

title: Master Piece
desc: A story about four unique friends, each with a different sense of humor and problem-solving style. They face challenges together, and viewers love them for relatable strengths.
